check-ci.description: Validate all CI gates (commit message, configs, code quality) before pushing
check-ci.prompt: Run the CI gate validation for corpus-kb. Check: 1) Commit message format (capital letter, 10-500 chars, no dangerous keywords), 2) Config files exist (opencode.json, cursor.json), 3) Code quality (ruff lint/format, pyright, pytest). Report results and tell me if it's safe to push.

pre-push.description: Complete CI validation before push - run this before 'git push'
pre-push.prompt: Run full corpus-kb CI validation with code quality checks enabled. Use the ci-guard skill to validate everything. If all pass, confirm safe to push. If any fail, show me exactly what needs fixing.
